en.extract:
The glaucous tanager (Thraupis glaucocolpa) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.  The term glaucous describes its colouration.  It is found in Colombia and Venezuela.  Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and heavily degraded former forest.

The '''glaucous tanager''' ('''''Thraupis glaucocolpa''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].  The term ''[[glaucous]]'' describes its colouration.  It is found in [[Colombia]] and [[Venezuela]].  Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and heavily degraded former forest.

zh.extract:
绿灰裸鼻雀（台湾作藍綠裸鼻雀，学名：Thraupis glaucocolpa），是雀形目裸鼻雀科的一种鸟类。
绿灰裸鼻雀体重约31.6克，翼长约88毫米，嘴峰长约17.3毫米，喙宽度约6.5毫米，喙厚度约7.5毫米，跗蹠长约20.5毫米，尾长约60.6毫米。绿灰裸鼻雀在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在半开放的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为杂食性。
绿灰裸鼻雀分布于哥伦比亚东北部和委内瑞拉北部及玛格丽塔岛。该物种是单型物种，没有亚种分化。
